title: Remote Graphic Designer Jobs at Canadian Agencies
description: Find remote graphic designer positions at Canadian design and advertising agencies.

mainEntity.name: Do Canadian agencies hire remote graphic designers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many top Canadian agencies like Rethink, Cossette, and lg2 hire remote or hybrid graphic designers. While some independent or smaller boutique agencies may prefer local talent, the post-pandemic shift has made remote work much more common, particularly for senior or specialized roles.

mainEntity.name: What is the typical salary for a remote graphic designer at a Canadian agency?

acceptedAnswer.text: Salaries for remote graphic designers at Canadian agencies typically range from $50,000 CAD to $65,000 CAD for junior/mid-level roles, and $70,000 CAD to $95,000+ CAD for senior designers, art directors, or motion design specialists.

mainEntity.name: What skills are agencies looking for in remote designers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Beyond core layout and typography skills, Canadian agencies are actively looking for proficiency in Figma, motion design (After Effects), and increasingly, AI-assisted workflows (Midjourney, Firefly). Strong communication and self-management are critical for remote candidates.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to live in the same province as the agency?

acceptedAnswer.text: It depends on the agency's tax and payroll setup. Many large agencies can hire across Canada. However, roles marked 'Hybrid' usually require living within commuting distance to major hubs like Toronto, Montreal, or Vancouver for occasional in-person collaboration.
